sections.heading: Meaning
sections.content: Civil society refers to non-governmental organizations formed to promote the interests and welfare of people.

sections.heading: Types
sections.content: Types include professional groups, labour unions, student organizations, business groups, NGOs, and religious organizations.

sections.heading: Functions
sections.content: They promote accountability, encourage participation, resolve conflicts, and monitor government activities.

sections.heading: Problems
sections.content: Challenges include lack of transparency, misuse of funds, political bias, and conflicts with government.
